text.arabic: ((اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَهُمْ فِيمَا رَزَقْتَهُم، وَاغْفِرْ لَهُمْ وَارْحَمْهُمْ)).
text.arabicTranslated: (Allahumma barik lahum feema razaqtahum, waghfir lahum warhamhum.)
text.translated: (O Allah, bless for them, that which You have provided them, forgive them and have mercy upon them.)

title: A dinner guest's invocation for his host
